title: ophryosporus johnstonii
intro: Ophryosporus johnstonii is a plant species, also known as the "Johnston's Ophryosporus", which is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and treating various infections, and it is also used to relieve pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
